description_long: This object is a futuristic, angular airplane with a sleek, metallic exterior and a distinctive twin-boom design. The wings are sharply swept and mounted mid-fuselage, with pronounced downward angles (anhedral) and winglets at the tips. The tail section features an H-tail configuration, with horizontal stabilizers connecting two vertical fins at the ends of the booms. Two jet engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, integrated into the booms. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed and streamlined, with a pointed nose and no visible windows or canopy details. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or omitted in this representation.
description: A sleek, metallic, twin-boom airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, H-tail, and rear jet engines. The design is angular and futuristic, with an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, enclosed cockpit, and the wide, swept wings with downward angles and winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, rear-mounted jet engines, and the angular, swept wings extending from the midsection.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizer, as well as the engine exhausts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the twin-boom structure, swept wings, and rear engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with pronounced anhedral angle and winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted and integrated into the booms.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a connecting horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; configuration indeterminate.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit at the nose of the fuselage.
